raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Wihrs ar tahm Nudelfla Drehbem paſlud-
dina/ kas nahkoſchôs Laikôs ar teem Keh-
nineem no Perſiag : 2. Ar Aleksandru to
Leelo : 3. Un winna Pehznahkameem : 5
Kâ arridsan ar Antioku to Leelako : 13. Un
winna Dehleem notiks : 26.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Augi/ trihs Kehnint wehl
R stahwehs Perseu Sem-
mê/ un tas zettortajs buhs
fohti baggate/ wairak ne ka tee
zitti/ un kad wiꞥſch eekſch farwas
Baggatibas buhs ſpehzinajees/
tad painohdinahs wiꞥſch wiſſu
prett to Greekeru Walstibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Pehz ſelfees weens warre-
najs Kehninsch/ kas ar leelu War-
ru waldihs/ un darrihs/ kas wiſ-
nam patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Un kad wiſſu ta stahwehs/
tad faluhſihs winna Walstiba/
un tapes tſchetrôs Debbes Wel-
jôs Dallita/ bet ne nahks uſ
winna Pehznahkameem / nedſ
arri ar tahdu Warru/ ar ko
wiſſch waldija/ jo winna Wal-
stiba taps iſdeldeta / un nahks
zitteem Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un tas Kehninsch prett
Deenas-Widdum/ kas weens no
winna Leeleem-Kungeein/ buhs
warrens/ bet weens zits buhs jo
warrens prett winnu / un tas
waldihs/ un winna Walditchana
buhs warrena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un pehz zitteem Gaddeim
tee kohpâ apdraudsinafees/ un ta
Kehnina prett Deenas-Widdu
Meita nahks pee ta Kehnina
prett Seemeta-Puffi / Weenai-
dibu darriht/ bet ta ne pastah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wehs ar ta Elkona Stipru
ir wiꞥſch nedſ winna Elkons
stahwehs. Bet ta tapſ nod-
ta ar teen/ kas to btj atwed-
fchi/ un ar to/ kas to dſen-
najs/ un kas winnu tannis
fôs stiprinajs.
7. Tatthu weens Atsars
wiṇṇas Zelma zelſees/ tas na-
ar Karra-Spehku/ un ateeg p-
ta Kehnina no Seemeta-Pu-
ſtipras Weetas/ un taififees p-
ti tahm/ un pahrwarrehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Wiꞥſch arri winnu
wus un winnu Leelus-Kun-
ar winna dahrgeem Rihkeen
Sudraba un Selta Zeeti-
atſweddihs us Egipti/ un
stahwehs kahdus Gaddus pre-
ta Kehnina no Seemeta-Pu-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un kad tas Kehninsch
Deenas-Widdus buhs (wi-
Walstibu zaur gahjis/ tad
greesifees wiſſch us farwu Se-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Bet winna Dehli apſ-
ſees/ un ſapulzinahs leeus Ra-
Spekus/ un (weens) na-
peepeſchi/ un pahrpluhdihs
Patsums/ un zaur ees/ un wi-
atgreesifees/ un kattinahs wi-
prett farwahm ſtiprahm Weeta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un tas Kehninsch no
nas-Widdus apſaititees/ un-
zelfees/ un karohs prett wi-
prett to Kehnina no Seem-
Puffes/ kas arri leelu Bulku-
kahs/ bet ſchtis Pulks taps-
na Rohka nodohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Kad nu ſchtis Pulks b-
kants/tad leppohs winna Si-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
